channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PNP Anti-Cybercrime Group reports 104 arrests and over 200 cybercrime cases filed in April
item.description: Iniulat ng Philippine National Police (PNP), sa pamamagitan ng Anti-Cybercrime Group (ACG), na umabot sa 104 na indibidwal ang naaresto noong Abril dahil sa iba’t ibang uri ng cyber offenses. Ayon sa ...

item.title: British Stars Shine in Black Gowns at the 2026 Met Gala
item.description: At the 2026 Met Gala in New York, British stars Cara Delevingne, Charli XCX, and Claire Foy captured attention on the red carpet with their striking black ensembles. Cara Delevingne, 33, opted for a s...

item.title: Profile and Career of Bryan Cranston’s Daughter, Taylor Dearden
item.description: Taylor Dearden Cranston, born on 12 February 1993 in Los Angeles, is the only daughter of Bryan Cranston and Robin Gale Dearden. She grew up around the entertainment industry, with both parents being ...

item.title: Highlights from the Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala took place on the first Monday of May in New York City, bringing together some of the world's most influential figures in fashion, entertainment, and culture. The red carpet showcase...

item.title: Saboti MP Caleb Amisi Commissions New 12-Classroom School Building, Pledges Continued Infrastructure Development
item.description: In Trans Nzoia, Saboti MP Caleb Amisi has officially opened a new 12-classroom three-storey building at Lukhuna Primary School, marking a major step in his mission to improve educational infrastructur...

item.title: Telangana Government Submits PPA Irregularities Report of BRS Era to CBI
item.description: On Monday, the Telangana government decided to hand over the inquiry report concerning alleged irregularities in power-purchase agreements (PPAs) during the previous Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) regim...

item.title: Pakistan Navy and Maritime Security Agency rescue stranded sailors in Arabian Sea
item.description: On 4th May 2026, the Pakistan Navy together with the Pakistan Maritime Security Agency (PMSA) conducted a successful humanitarian rescue operation in the Arabian Sea. The operation helped over half a ...

item.title: Daniel Baldwin expresses concern over Hollywood rhetoric after attack on Trump
item.description: Actor Daniel Baldwin publicly criticized late-night host Jimmy Kimmel for his repeated political commentary targeting President Donald Trump, suggesting that such rhetoric could contribute to real-wor...

item.title: LTFRB calls six bus operators to explain failure in giving fare discounts under service contracting program
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has called six bus operators after reports emerged that their bus conductors were not providing the required fare discounts under the g...

item.title: Court Orders High Court to Prioritise Petition Against Kenya’s Ratification of WHO Pandemic Treaty
item.description: On Monday, May 4, the Court of Appeal in Nairobi ordered the High Court to prioritise a petition challenging Kenya’s ratification of the global Pandemic Treaty under the World Health Organisation (WHO...

item.title: Ex-Skye Bank Chairman Tunde Ayeni Remanded in Kuje Prison Over N8bn Money Laundering Case
item.description: The Federal Capital Territory High Court don order say Tunde Ayeni, wey be former chairman of the now-defunct Skye Bank Plc, go dey remand for Kuje Correctional Centre while him bail application dey p...

item.title: Economic Concerns Push Young Voters Toward Democrats Ahead of Midterms
item.description: A recent national survey of over 1,000 young Americans highlights growing challenges for the Republican Party ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. While young voters swung Republican in 2024, dissatis...

item.title: Anna Wintour attends 2026 Met Gala as protests erupt over Bezos' sponsorship
item.description: The 2026 Met Gala took place at the Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York City, with Anna Wintour, former chief of Vogue, leading the event. This year's theme, 'Fashion is Art,' was inspired by the C...

item.title: Florida Republican Candidate Highlights Fundraising Success and Supports GOP Agenda Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Scott Singer, former Republican mayor of Boca Raton and a first-time congressional candidate, is projecting optimism for the GOP ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. Singer reported a strong first-qua...

item.title: Three die after rescue boat capsizes off NSW North Coast
item.description: In a tragic incident off the New South Wales North Coast, three people have lost their lives after a rescue boat capsized overnight. Authorities have confirmed the fatalities, though the circumstances...

item.title: Western Sydney YouTubers host special appearance by Meghan Markle for followers
item.description: Western Sydney-based YouTubers Sean and Marley, who collectively have over one million subscribers, recently created a buzz online by arranging a surprise appearance of The Duchess of Sussex, Meghan M...

item.title: Strategies for Engaging with Classic Literature in a Distracted World
item.description: Over the past decade and a half, university students have shown a declining patience for reading long-form literature, often opting for audiobooks instead. Neuroscientist Maryanne Wolf suggests that t...

item.title: BJP Wins West Bengal Assembly Elections, TMC Suffers Major Loss
item.description: In a historic shift in West Bengal politics, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has secured a decisive victory in the 2026 state assembly elections, ending a long period of Trinamool Congress (TMC) domi...

item.title: Witness alleges police misconduct during Senzo Meyiwa murder investigation
item.description: A new witness, Mandlenkosi Goodman Zondo, testified in the Pretoria high court regarding alleged police misconduct in the case of the late South African footballer Senzo Meyiwa, who was killed during ...

item.title: Highlights of the Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet Fashion
item.description: The Met Gala 2026 took place with the theme “Fashion is Art,” presenting a particularly abstract dress code that challenged attendees to celebrate depictions of the dressed body across history. The ex...
